_comment: Hand-edit this file to show the last few recoveries on the homepage. Empty 'jobs' array = section auto-hides. Add a new job to the top of the array — old ones at the bottom can be deleted. Each entry needs: route (free text), vehicle, summary. Optional: date (YYYY-MM-DD), miles, price (£) — only set price if you're comfortable showing it publicly.

jobs.summary: Recovered after a parking-lot bump. Direct delivery to insurer's preferred shop.
Auction collection for a regular trade customer. Tilt-bed, soft straps, photo handover.
Hard-shoulder breakdown, 12V battery dead. Tilt-bed lift, dropped at customer's home.
